query:
INSERT INTO lectures (title, description, speaker_name, speaker_title, speaker_image, session_date, session_time, duration_minutes, platform, registration_link, flyer_image, youtube_url, status, created_at) VALUES (
  'How to Write a Research Proposal: From Idea to Approval',
  'Learn the essential steps to craft a compelling research proposal that gets approved. This comprehensive session covers everything from developing your research question to presenting a convincing case for funding and ethical approval.',
  'Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi',
  'BSc, MD, MSc, FRACP, FACP - Founder of MedResearch Academy',
  '/images/dr-alawi.jpg',
  '2026-02-11',
  '20:00:00',
  60,
  'Zoom',
  'https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/JF4MkhQCSgCAHDmzSA0gTg',
  '/images/research-proposal-flyer.png',
  NULL,
  'upcoming',
  NOW()
);
